title: Castle of the Banned Lovers
writer: Jacques Rémy, Filippo Sanjust, Riccardo Freda
actors: Micheline Presle, Gino Cervi, Fausto Tozzi
plot: The beautiful Beatrice Cenci, daughter of the noble Francesco, falls in love with the intendant Olimpio. But she has to face the jealousy of her violent and morbid father, and the hostility of her stepmother Lucrezia.
